email.invalid_format: The email address format is invalid.
email.too_long: The email address must not exceed 255 characters.

firstname.too_short: The first name must contain at least 2 characters.
firstname.too_long: The first name must not exceed 50 characters.
firstname.invalid_chars: The first name may contain letters and spaces only.

lastname.too_short: The last name must contain at least 2 characters.
lastname.too_long: The last name must not exceed 50 characters.
lastname.invalid_chars: The last name may contain letters and spaces only.

phone.invalid_format: The phone number format is invalid (+261 32/33/34/38 followed by 7 digits).

password.too_short: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
password.too_long: The password must not exceed 128 characters.
password.missing_uppercase: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
password.missing_lowercase: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
password.missing_digit: The password must contain at least one digit.

file.too_large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size of 5 MB.
file.invalid_format: The file format is not supported.

zone.invalid_value: An invalid zone was passed to the back-end.

photos.min_count: A minimum of 3 images is required.
photos.max_count: A maximum of 10 images is allowed.

price.positive: The price must be a positive value.

title.too_long: The title must not exceed 100 characters.

description.too_long: The description must not exceed 2000 characters.

schedule.invalid_day: The day must be between 0 (Sunday) and 6 (Saturday).

report_comment.too_short: The comment is too short (minimum 10 characters).
report_comment.too_long: The comment is too long (maximum 500 characters).

slot.invalid_format: The date format is invalid (ISO 8601 expected).
slot.past_or_too_soon: The selected slot must be in the future by at least two hours.

rating.range: The rating must be between 1 and 5.

amount.positive: The amount must be a positive value.
amount.min: The minimum required amount is 1 credit.

reason.too_short: The reason provided is too short.
reason.too_long: The reason provided is too long.
